name: @getvinyls/scraper
description: Thin Turbo wrapper for the Python Scrapy project. No JS deps; scripts shell out to uv/ruff/pyright.

scripts.lint: uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.scrape: uv run scrapy crawl discogs && uv run scrapy crawl coldcutshotwax && uv run scrapy crawl deejay && uv run scrapy crawl dancingvinyl
